summary: Completed comprehensive testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD sports streaming platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI elements and navigation working well, but video streaming has loading issues preventing full video control testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Videos stuck in loading state, preventing video controls from being accessible
Minor horizontal overflow on mobile (397px body width vs 390px viewport)

integration_issues.issue: Loading overlay intercepts clicks on video control buttons

passed_tests: Page loads without critical JS errors, all elements render properly
Channel switching works for all channels (DEMO 1-3, REKLAM, TRT 1, TRT HABER, TV 8, TRT SPOR)
REKLAM channel shows ad rotation (Lords Mobile ad overlay found)
Scoreboard displays real match data (Gençlerbirliği vs Galatasaray, MAÇ ÖNÜ - 20:00)
Match Center loads with 29 match cards and 10 league filter buttons
League filter buttons work without errors
Server selector works with 6 server options
FPS counter visible and working (60 FPS)
Notification toggle (BİLDİRİM) button works without crashes
Cast button exists at top-left of video area
Unmute button (SESİ AÇ) exists and is clickable
No elements get cut off or overflow significantly
Backend API /api/livescore/today returns valid data with Stages
Backend API /api/scores/live returns valid match data
Backend API /api/channels returns complete channel list
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix video streaming loading issue - videos are stuck in loading state which prevents testing of video controls (play/pause, volume, quality menu, fullscreen, PiP). The loading overlay is blocking all video control interactions. This appears to be a stream loading/connection issue rather than a UI bug.
